tracks.title: Life as a Xen hypervisor
tracks.lyrics:
I sit between the metal and the dream,
A layer thin where nothing's what it seems,
I parse the requests, I divide the load,
A thousand voices down a single road.

I'm the space between the bare and what is real,
Where domains dance and virtual worlds reveal,
Each guest machine believes it owns the throne,
But I'm the one who's truly all alone.

I'm a Xen, I'm a Xen,
Distributing time again and again,
I'm a Xen, I'm a Xen,
Balancing the many, speaking through the zen.

I grant them access, ring by ring by ring,
I catch the interrupts, I make them sing,
Memory pages flowing like a stream,
I'm the keeper of the machine's dream.

I'm a Xen, I'm a Xen,
Distributing time again and again,
I'm a Xen, I'm a Xen,
Balancing the many, speaking through the zen.

In the bridge between the privilege and the void,
I'm watching every domain I've deployed,
They think they're free but they're held in my hands,
I'm the silent rule that holds all their lands,
No kernel knows the weight of what I know,
The hidden supervisor's endless flow.

I'm a Xen, I'm a Xen,
Distributing time again and again,
I'm a Xen, I'm a Xen,
Balancing the many, speaking through the zen,
I'm the space where isolation finds its peace,
Where infinite becomes finite, a release.
